spec_match.rationale: Excellent native implementation measuring the timing race correctly inside the textarea click handler, and restoring focus/selection gracefully after toolbar mutations.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive IDE environment where users can comment-toggle, quote-wrap, and transform casing of custom drag-selected editor strings.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the Code Editor Selection description.

edge_cases.rationale: Identifies browser capability timing inside the click event comparison block and presents responsive status badges.

design_system.rationale: Aesthetically pleasing dark mode code panel integrating smoothly with standard showcase elements.
